mapper.insert: INSERT INTO security_board_like VALUES ( seq_security_board_like.nextval, #{boardNo}, #{userId}, sysdate )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM security_board_like WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) AS count FROM security_board_like WHERE board_no = #{no}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM security_board_like WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
